heroSubtext: Retrofit double glazing is our main business — we add a second pane to your existing windows. We also do emergency repairs, shower screens, splashbacks, mirrors, and commercial glazing. 10-year warranty on every job.

serviceSections.heading: Retrofit Double Glazing
serviceSections.bodyText: We add a second layer of glass to your existing windows — no frame replacement. Works on timber, aluminium, and steel frames. Installed in one day with minimal disruption.
bullets: Works on existing timber, aluminium & steel frames
Up to 70% quieter — ideal for tram & traffic noise
Up to 70% less heat loss in winter
Installed in one day, no permits required
Beat any genuine quote by 30% — guaranteed in writing

serviceSections.heading: Emergency Glass Repair
serviceSections.bodyText: Broken window? We respond within 2–4 hours across Melbourne. Temporary board-up available if immediate replacement isn't possible. Insurance documentation provided on request.
bullets: 2–4 hour response time for inner suburbs
All glass types: single, double, shower screens, shopfronts

serviceSections.heading: Shower Screens
serviceSections.bodyText: Semi-frameless and frameless shower screens supplied and installed across Melbourne. We measure on site for a perfect fit.

serviceSections.heading: Glass Splashbacks
serviceSections.bodyText: Custom glass splashbacks in any colour for kitchens and bathrooms. Toughened safety glass, cut to size and installed by our team.
bullets: Any colour — matched to your paint or tile
Easy to clean, no grout lines

serviceSections.heading: Custom Mirrors
serviceSections.bodyText: Custom cut mirrors for bathrooms, living spaces, and commercial fit-outs. We supply and install mirrors to any size.
bullets: Bathroom, gym, and feature wall mirrors

serviceSections.heading: Commercial Glazing
serviceSections.bodyText: Shopfronts, office partitions, and commercial glazing across Melbourne. We've done bowling clubs, retail fit-outs, and office buildings.

faqSubheading: Common questions about what we do.

faqs.q: How much does retrofit double glazing cost in Melbourne?
faqs.a: Most Melbourne homes pay from $595 per square metre for retrofit double glazing, depending on glass type, frame condition, and access. Full window replacement typically costs 30–50% more.

faqs.q: Is retrofit double glazing cheaper than replacing windows?
faqs.a: Yes. Because we reuse your existing frames, retrofit double glazing avoids structural work and usually costs 30–50% less than a full window replacement.

faqs.q: Does retrofit double glazing work on old timber frames?
faqs.a: Yes — retrofit is specifically designed for existing frames including single-glazed timber, aluminium, and steel windows common in Melbourne's older homes.

faqs.q: Will it reduce tram and traffic noise?
faqs.a: Retrofit acoustic double glazing significantly reduces low-frequency traffic and tram noise. We recommend our acoustic glass option for homes near Melbourne trams or arterials.

faqs.q: How long does retrofit double glazing installation take?
faqs.a: Most homes are completed in one day. We work room by room to minimise disruption.

faqs.q: What is the warranty on retrofit double glazing?
faqs.a: We offer a 10-year warranty on all retrofit double glazing installations, covering glass and workmanship with no conditions or fine print.

faqs.q: Can you beat a competitor quote on double glazing?
faqs.a: Yes — we will beat any genuine, like-for-like written competitor quote by at least 30%, guaranteed in writing with the same 10-year warranty.

faqs.q: Do you do 24/7 emergency glass repair in Melbourne?
faqs.a: Yes. We provide emergency glass repair and board-up services across Melbourne, available 24 hours.

faqs.q: How quickly can you respond to a broken window in Melbourne?
faqs.a: We aim to respond within 2–4 hours for emergency calls across inner Melbourne suburbs.

faqs.q: Do you provide temporary board-up for broken windows?
faqs.a: Yes — if glass cannot be replaced immediately, we provide secure temporary board-up to protect your property.

faqs.q: Is emergency glass repair covered by home insurance?
faqs.a: Most home and contents policies cover accidental glass breakage. We can provide documentation to support your claim.

faqs.q: Do you service all Melbourne suburbs?
faqs.a: Yes — we cover all of metropolitan Melbourne, eastern, northern, and inner-western suburbs. Call for outer-metro jobs.
Most jobs are scheduled within 2–3 weeks of deposit. Emergency glass repairs are same-day.
Retrofit double glazing quotes are done online with our Instant Estimate tool — no site visit needed. Shower screens and custom work require a site measure.
